text: By the winds scattering ňĻdustňļ,

text: Surely you are ňĻlostňļ in conflicting views ňĻregarding the truthňļ. <sup foot_note=1092>1092</sup>

text: Condemned are the liars‚ÄĒ
those who are ňĻsteepedňļ in ignorance, totally heedless.
They ask ňĻmockinglyňļ, ‚ÄúWhen is this Day of Judgment?‚ÄĚ
ňĻIt isňļ the Day they will be tormented over the Fire.
ňĻThey will be told,ňļ ‚ÄúTaste your torment! This is what you sought to hasten.‚ÄĚ
Indeed, the righteous will be amid Gardens and springs,
ňĻjoyfullyňļ receiving what their Lord will grant them. Before this ňĻrewardňļ they were truly good-doers ňĻin the worldňļ:
they used to sleep only little in the night,
and pray for forgiveness before dawn. <sup foot_note=1094>1094</sup>

text: And in their wealth there was a rightful share ňĻfulfilledňļ for the beggar and the poor.
There are ňĻcountlessňļ signs on earth for those with sure faith,
as there are within yourselves. Can you not see?
In heaven is your sustenance and whatever you are promised.
Then by the Lord of heaven and earth! ňĻAllňļ this is certainly as true as ňĻthe fact thatňļ you can speak!
Has the story of Abraham‚Äôs honoured guests reached you ňĻO Prophetňļ?
ňĻRememberňļ when they entered his presence and greeted ňĻhim withňļ, ‚ÄúPeace!‚ÄĚ He replied, ‚ÄúPeace ňĻbe upon youňļ!‚ÄĚ ňĻThen he said to himself,ňļ ‚ÄúňĻThese areňļ an unfamiliar people.‚ÄĚ
Then he slipped off to his family and brought a fat ňĻroastedňļ calf, <sup foot_note=1095>1095</sup>

foot_notes.1095: Abraham ( Ô∑ļ ) did not want his guests to know that he was going to prepare a meal for them so they would not ask him not to.

text: and placed it before them, asking, ‚ÄúWill you not eat?‚ÄĚ

ňĻThey did not eat,ňļ so he grew fearful of them. <sup foot_note=1096>1096</sup> They reassured ňĻhimňļ, ‚ÄúDo not be afraid,‚ÄĚ and gave him good news of a knowledgeable son. <sup foot_note=1097>1097</sup>

foot_notes.1096: As mentioned in 11:69-70, the angels came to Abraham in the form of men and when he offered them food, they did not eat. In ancient Middle Eastern culture, if a guest refused to eat the food provided by their host, it was a sign of ill-will.

text: Then his wife came forward with a cry, clasping her forehead ňĻin astonishmentňļ, exclaiming, ‚ÄúňĻA baby fromňļ a barren, old woman!‚ÄĚ
They replied, ‚ÄúSuch has your Lord decreed. He is truly the All-Wise, All-Knowing.‚ÄĚ
ňĻLater,ňļ Abraham asked, ‚ÄúWhat is your mission, O messengers?‚ÄĚ
They replied, ‚ÄúWe have actually been sent to a wicked people,
to send upon them stones of ňĻbakedňļ clay,
marked by your Lord for the transgressors.‚ÄĚ
Then ňĻbefore the tormentňļ We evacuated the believers from the city.
But We only found one family that had submitted ňĻto Allahňļ. <sup foot_note=1098>1098</sup>

text: And We have left a sign there <sup foot_note=1099>1099</sup> ňĻas a lessonňļ for those who fear the painful punishment.
And in ňĻthe story ofňļ Moses ňĻwas another lesson,ňļ when We sent him to Pharaoh with compelling proof,
but Pharaoh was carried away by his power, saying ňĻof Mosesňļ, ‚ÄúA magician or a madman!‚ÄĚ

text: There was nothing it came upon that it did not reduce to ashes.

text: Still they persisted in defying the commands of their Lord, so they were overtaken by a ňĻmightyňļ blast while they were looking on.
Then they were not able to rise up, nor were they helped.
And the people of Noah ňĻhad also been destroyedňļ earlier. They were truly a rebellious people.
We built the universe with ňĻgreatňļ might, and We are certainly expanding ňĻitňļ.
As for the earth, We spread it out. How superbly did We smooth it out! <sup foot_note=1103>1103</sup>

foot_notes.1103: The globe was spread out to accommodate Allah‚Äôs creation. The spherical shape of the earth is expressed in 39:5.

text: And We created pairs of all things <sup foot_note=1104>1104</sup> so perhaps you would be mindful.

foot_notes.1104: For example, male and female, sweet and bitter, day and night, plains and mountains, heat and cold, light and darkness.

text: So ňĻproclaim, O Prophetňļ: ‚ÄúFlee to Allah! I am truly sent by Him with a clear warning to you.
And do not set up another god with Allah. I am truly sent by Him with a clear warning to you.‚ÄĚ
Similarly, no messenger came to those before them without being told: ‚ÄúA magician or a madman!‚ÄĚ
Have they passed this ňĻclich√©ňļ down to one another? In fact, they have ňĻallňļ been a transgressing people.
So ňĻnowňļ turn away from them ňĻO Prophetňļ, for you will not be blamed. <sup foot_note=1105>1105</sup>

foot_notes.1105: Since you have already delivered the message clearly.

text: But ňĻcontinue toňļ remind. For certainly reminders benefit the believers.
I did not create jinn and humans except to worship Me.
I seek no provision from them, nor do I need them to feed Me.
Indeed, Allah ňĻaloneňļ is the Supreme Provider‚ÄĒLord of all Power, Ever Mighty.
The wrongdoers will certainly have a share ňĻof the tormentňļ like that of their predecessors. So do not let them ask Me to hasten ňĻitňļ.
Woe then to the disbelievers when they face their Day which they are warned of!
